MPItem.productName: Head Case Designs Naruto Shippuden Akatsuki Hybrid MagSafe Clear Bumper Case for Apple iPhone 17 Pro Max
MPItem.shortDescription:
The Head Case Designs Naruto Shippuden Akatsuki Hybrid MagSafe Clear Bumper Case for Apple iPhone 17 Pro Max combines officially licensed Naruto Shippuden artwork with premium phone case protection for your Apple iPhone 17 Pro Max. The iconic red cloud pattern of the Akatsuki organization from Naruto Shippuden, featuring the distinctive crimson clouds on a dark background. This hybrid magsafe clear bumper case is the perfect way to showcase your fandom while keeping your device safe from everyday wear and tear.

Engineered with a TPU bumper + PC hard back + integrated MagSafe magnetic ring construction, this Naruto Shippuden Akatsuki phone case delivers military-grade drop protection in a slim, lightweight profile. The shock-absorbing bumper guards against impacts from all angles, while the scratch-resistant polycarbonate back panel preserves the vivid, high-definition UV-printed Akatsuki artwork for long-lasting color vibrancy. The integrated MagSafe magnetic ring ensures perfect alignment with MagSafe chargers and accessories, while remaining fully compatible with standard Qi wireless charging.

Designed specifically for the Apple iPhone 17 Pro Max, this case features precision-cut openings for all ports, buttons, speakers, and camera lenses, ensuring complete device functionality without ever removing the case. Raised bezels around the screen and camera module provide additional scratch and drop protection when placed face-down on surfaces.

Head Case Designs is a leading UK-based designer of officially licensed phone accessories with over 15 years of experience creating premium cases for fans worldwide. Every design is crafted in-house and produced under official license, guaranteeing authentic Naruto Shippuden artwork you will not find anywhere else.
